expected: {"summary": "SQL injection vulnerability detected", "issues": [{"severity": "high", "category": "security", "line": "2", "description": "Direct string interpolation in SQL query allows SQL injection", "suggestion": "Use parameterized queries instead", "code_example": "db.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id])"}], "strengths": [], "recommendations": ["Always use parameterized queries for user inputs"]}

{"summary": "Missing error handling for network failures", "issues": [{"severity": "medium", "category": "error-handling", "line": "2", "description": "No check for HTTP status before parsing JSON", "suggestion": "Verify response.ok before parsing"}, {"severity": "medium", "category": "error-handling", "line": "2", "description": "No try-catch for network errors", "suggestion": "Wrap in try-catch block"}], "strengths": ["Using async/await correctly", "Correct HTTP method usage"], "recommendations": ["Add error handling for non-200 responses"]}

{"summary": "Class violates Single Responsibility Principle", "issues": [{"severity": "low", "category": "maintainability", "line": "1", "description": "UserService has multiple responsibilities", "suggestion": "Split into UserRepository, EmailService, Logger, CacheService"}], "strengths": ["Clear method naming", "Dependencies are injected"], "recommendations": ["Consider dependency injection framework", "Extract services by domain"]}

{"summary": "N+1 query performance issue detected", "issues": [{"severity": "high", "category": "performance", "line": "1", "description": "N+1 query: separate query for each user", "suggestion": "Use JOIN or batch query", "code_example": "const users = await db.query('SELECT u.*, o.* FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id')"}], "strengths": [], "recommendations": ["Profile queries with EXPLAIN ANALYZE", "Consider ORM eager loading"]}

{"summary": "Hardcoded API key security issue", "issues": [{"severity": "high", "category": "security", "line": "1", "description": "API key exposed in source code", "suggestion": "Use environment variables", "code_example": "const API_KEY = process.env.WEATHER_API_KEY"}], "strengths": [], "recommendations": ["Rotate exposed credentials immediately", "Use secret management service"]}

{"summary": "Duplicate method signature detected", "issues": [{"severity": "medium", "category": "best-practice", "line": "5", "description": "Method overloading not supported in JavaScript", "suggestion": "Use optional parameters or different method names", "code_example": "add(...numbers) { return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) }"}], "strengths": ["Simple logic", "Descriptive method name"], "recommendations": ["Consider TypeScript for type safety"]}

{"summary": "PR improves security but needs transaction handling", "issues": [{"severity": "medium", "category": "error-handling", "line": "3", "description": "Cache invalidation should be in same transaction as DB delete", "suggestion": "Use transactional outbox pattern or event-driven cache invalidation"}], "strengths": ["Uses parameterized query (prevents SQL injection)", "Deletes from cache after DB update"], "recommendations": ["Consider adding soft delete for audit trail"]}

metadata.header: ## Developer Work Analysis from Git Diff

expected: {"summary": "Code smell: filter logic and TODO comment", "issues": [{"severity": "low", "category": "best-practice", "line": "1", "description": "TODO comment indicates incomplete implementation", "suggestion": "Complete the implementation or create tracking issue"}, {"severity": "low", "category": "style", "line": "4", "description": "Manual filter loop instead of array method", "suggestion": "Use filter and map methods", "code_example": "return data.filter(d => d.active).map(d => d.value)"}], "strengths": [], "recommendations": ["Remove TODO once fixed", "Consider functional approach"]}

{"summary": "Well-structured review request with clear context", "issues": [], "strengths": ["Clear role definition", "Context specifies language and framework", "Focus areas defined", "Output format specified"], "recommendations": ["Consider adding code complexity threshold", "Add specific OWASP checklist if security is priority"]}

{"summary": "Inconsistent data access based on role", "issues": [{"severity": "high", "category": "security", "line": "1", "description": "Different query paths based on isAdmin flag could leak data", "suggestion": "Apply row-level security at database level", "code_example": "Always filter by organization_id regardless of role"}], "strengths": ["Attempts to limit data for non-admin users"], "recommendations": ["Use database views or RLS policies", "Add integration test for data isolation"]}
